description: A faithful mechanical pink Jerry-like mouse Codex pet with oversized round ears, a big cheerful face, blush-pink enamel, cream porcelain muzzle and belly, light antique brass joints, and a long segmented tail.

idle.notes: Quiet standing idle with tiny blink, slight ear twitch, and gentle tail sway.

walk.notes: Directional mouse walk used for movement and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Subtle head tilt and forward-leaning observant loop.

happy.notes: Restrained friendly pleased gesture with a small paw lift and brighter expression.

sleep.notes: Gentle dozing loop with closed eyes and relaxed ears and tail.

sit.notes: Dedicated seated rest loop stored in the spare atlas row.

probe.notes: Spare in-place busy companion loop without directional travel.

deep_rest.notes: Deeper sleepy curl used as a calm extra rest state.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true-facing walk rows rather than a guessed mirror mapping.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
head, body, paws, and tail stay directionally unified in both walk rows
left drag never faces right and right drag never faces left
